top_signals.title: FountainVest Is Said to Mull Sale of Swiss Micro-Tools Maker SPT
top_signals.summary: FountainVest is considering selling Small Precision Tools, a Swiss manufacturer of high-precision components and tools, according to people familiar with the situation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
